field.label: Enable NetShield
field.help: Master switch — enable the NetShield service and all configured features.

field.label: Log Level
field.help: Verbosity of the NetShield service log. Use DEBUG only for troubleshooting.

field.label: Device Discovery Interval (seconds)
field.help: How often NetShield scans for new or changed devices on the network (10–300 seconds).

field.label: Alert Cooldown (minutes)
field.help: Minimum time between repeated alerts for the same event to prevent notification flooding (1–1440 minutes).

field.label: Enable DNS Filtering
field.help: Enable DNS-based content filtering. Requires at least one enabled target list or web category.

field.label: Force Safe Search
field.help: Redirect Google, YouTube, and Bing DNS responses to their SafeSearch endpoints.

field.label: Block DNS-over-HTTPS / DNS-over-TLS
field.help: Block known DoH/DoT providers to prevent clients from bypassing DNS filtering.

field.label: Enable Deep Packet Inspection
field.help: Enable application identification via DPI. Required for application-based policies.

field.label: Enable VPN / Tunnel Detection
field.help: Detect VPN protocols and anonymising tunnels including WireGuard, OpenVPN, and Shadowsocks.

field.label: Enable Device Tracking
field.help: Continuously track connected devices by MAC address, hostname, and fingerprint.

field.label: Suricata Integration
field.help: Consume Suricata EVE JSON alerts to enrich NetShield threat detection. Requires Suricata to be installed and running.

field.label: Force DNS through Gateway
field.help: Redirect all outbound DNS queries (UDP/TCP port 53) to the gateway DNS server, preventing DNS bypass.

field.label: Block VPN Ports
field.help: Block outbound traffic on common VPN ports: WireGuard UDP/51820, OpenVPN UDP/1194, IPsec UDP/500 and UDP/4500.

field.label: Block Proxy Ports
field.help: Block outbound traffic on common proxy ports: SOCKS5 TCP/1080, HTTP proxy TCP/3128, TCP/8080, TCP/8888.

field.label: Enable Syslog Forwarding
field.help: Forward NetShield alerts to an external syslog server (RFC 5424).

field.label: Syslog Host
field.help: Hostname or IP address of the target syslog server.

field.label: Syslog Port
field.help: UDP or TCP port number on the syslog server (default: 514).

field.label: Syslog Protocol
field.help: Transport protocol for syslog messages. Use TCP for reliable delivery.

field.label: Enable Webhook Notifications
field.help: Send alert payloads as JSON POST requests to a configurable webhook URL.

field.label: Webhook URL
field.help: HTTPS endpoint that will receive JSON-encoded alert payloads. Supports Slack, Teams, generic HTTP integrations, and custom endpoints.

field.label: Enable GeoIP Blocking
field.help: Enable country-based traffic blocking. Configure blocked countries on the GeoIP page.
